ogTitle: Old Grevillia vs Old Guildford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Grevillia and Old Guildford.
heading: Old Grevillia vs Old Guildford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Grevillia, New South Wales and Old Guildford, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Guildford has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Old Grevillia (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Grevillia or Old Guildford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Grevillia has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Old Guildford scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Grevillia scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Old Guildford scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Grevillia or Old Guildford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Guildford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
